红绳糯米今犹在，不见当年林道人。
末法时代灵气稀薄，旁人都在愁长生无望、众生皆苦，唯独林冬活得逍遥又自在。
重生民国，拜入茅山，成九叔师弟，觉醒灵植育兽园。
靠着时间加速、空间种田疯狂囤货
灵果摘到手软，异兽养得比自己还猛，炼器材料堆成小山，法宝多得数不过来。
乱世妖魔横行？他顺手斩妖除魔攒功德。
旁人困死凡界？他却靠时空之树，在诸天万界，寻找安稳发展的躺平之地，偷偷发育。
主打一个“你们卷你们的，我闷声攒家底破界飞升”。
在末法时代走出了一条躺赢式超脱大道！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/c653ba51903e757488c952d6748e627c","author":"口曰目","author_id":"","book_id":"7435690879597153342","book_name":"诸界修行：以民国九叔为起点","book_short_name":"于末法争渡","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d07030","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":81,"name":"盗墓","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=81&name=盗墓&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":383,"name":"九叔","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=383&name=九叔&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7435860819830653502","read_count":"26148","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1937804"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.5","serial_count":"922","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,空间,盗墓,九叔,同人","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/b9eab2210a563595709a9f4bc1b08658~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779393948&x-signature=r2yzEOXomGjv7GRx9z6KTPZhJMQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1582910341121751","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"47"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230405487C767C286E6BA5CF7707"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":13,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_dura
